description: Total asset value grouped by category.
purpose: Provides total purchase cost breakdown by asset category for financial reporting.
fromSql: SELECT tasset_as_category AS category, COUNT(*) AS asset_count, COALESCE(SUM(tasset_as_purchase_cost), 0) AS total_value FROM mt_tasset_asset WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND tasset_as_status != 'retired' GROUP BY tasset_as_category ORDER BY total_value DESC
